$comment: Fabric-native code-review rules. Copy to <repo>/.fabric/code-review-rules.json (or ~/.fabric/code-review-rules.json for a user-global set). The upstream-compatible location <repo>/.opencodereview/rule.json with the same shape is also read if present. Each file inherits every rule whose glob matches its path, plus the built-in defaults (references/review-rules.md). A matching user rule replaces the built-in system rule for that file unless merge_system_rule is true, in which case both apply.

rules.rule: Validate required parameters for null before use. Flag SQL built by string concatenation. Check thread-safety on shared mutable fields.
Flag untrusted data assigned to innerHTML or dangerouslySetInnerHTML (XSS). Require error handling on await/promise chains; no empty catch.
Flag subprocess with shell=True, os.system, eval/exec on user input, and pickle.loads on untrusted data. Require parameterized DB queries.
Check SQL for injection risks and missing closing tags.
Flag destructive or non-reversible schema changes and missing down-migrations.
